docs.title: Welcome to Your Project
docs.text: This is the official documentation for python_template. This site is built using MkDocs and the fabulous Material for MkDocs theme.

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
Welcome to your new documentation site! Here is a quick example of a code snippet:

from python_template import say_hello

say_hello("World")

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Modern & Fast: Built for speed and simplicity.
  • Beautiful Docs: Material design ready out-of-the-box.
  • Extensible: Add MkDocstrings to automatically generate references from your Python code.

docs.title: Next Steps
docs.text:
• Edit this file located at docs/index.md to change this page.
  • Visit the mkdocs.yml file to configure website navigation and themes.
  • Run mkdocs serve to see your changes locally live in your browser!

docs.title: About This Project
docs.text: This page provides information about the purpose, goals, and history of the project.

docs.title: Mission
docs.text: Our goal is to provide a comprehensive, ready-to-use template for modern Python development. We believe in reducing boilerplate and jumping straight into the business logic.

docs.title: The Team
docs.text:
• John Doe - Lead Developer & Maintainer
  • Community - All our wonderful contributors!

docs.title: License
docs.text:
This project is open-source and available under the terms of the MIT License. Feel free to use, modify, and distribute it for both commercial and non-commercial purposes.

To learn more about contributing, please check out our CONTRIBUTING.md on GitHub!
